zh.North Mymms, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾諾斯 米姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Knollys於1402年出生在英國賀特福爾諾斯 米姆斯時，他的父親Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London52歲，母親Joan48歲。他於大約1430年與Margaret d'Oyley在英國賀福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1485年在英國賀特福爾享年83歲。

nameMeanings.name: Knollys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knowles
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English knol(le) ‘knoll, hilltop’ (Old English cnoll) or from any of the many places (some lost) named with this word, for example Knowle (Devon, Dorset, Lancashire, Somerset, Warwickshire, and Yorkshire) and Knole (Kent, Sussex).
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tnúthghail (see Newell ).
English: variant of Noel , often, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Knollys was born in 1402, in North Mymms, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London, was 52 and his mother, Joan, was 48. He married Margaret d'Oyley about 1430, in Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1485, in Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Knollys est né en 1402, à North Mymms, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Margaret d'Oyley environ 1430, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1485, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans.

Er hat um 1430 in Herefordshire, England Margaret d'Oyley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1485 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Knollysが1402年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアノース ムインムズで生まれた時，父Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of Londonは52歳，母Joanは48歳であった。約1430年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでMargaret d'Oyleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1485年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Knollys(이)가 1402년 영국 허트퍼드실르 노르스 마이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan(은)는 48세였다. 그는 대략 1430년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 Margaret d'Oyley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret d'Oyley aproximadamente 1430, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1485, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Knollys родился в 1402 г. в местности норт миммс, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Joan, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret d'Oyley около 1430 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1485 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет.

Se casó con Margaret d'Oyley aproximadamente 1430, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1485, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años.
